title: Florida Statutes § 316.46 — Equipment regulations for mopeds.
text: 316.46 Equipment regulations for mopeds.—No person may operate a moped that does not conform to all applicable federal motor vehicle safety standards relating to lights and safety and other equipment contained in Title 49, Code of Federal Regulations. A violation of this section is a noncriminal traffic infraction, punishable as a nonmoving violation as provided in chapter 318.
